# SF = Stable frequency
# VF = Variable frequency
# Not auto-generated, just copied from a print out in random_results.py
# These are all % improvements over baseline, so +EDP% is good result here
SF EDP range: 7.0012% to 31.739%
SF IPS range: 0.0% to 0.0%
VF EDP range: 16.485% to 33.3026%
VF IPS range: 0.0% to 10.184%
# Across every program, what is the maximum temperature we see per program (so coldest max temp is 77, hottest max temp is 80)
SF Max temperature range: 77.03 to 80.65 celsius
